case_title: ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. NICHELLE AKINS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AKINS, NICHELLE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,600.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2008 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENTERPRISE RENT A CAR OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT AKINS, NICHELLE
NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO PLAINTIFF.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. NO APPEARANCES BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206). (DISPO)
